chapter_title.ar: باب مَنْ لَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُ بَيِّنَةٌ فَيُرَدُّ عَلَيْهِ الْيَمِينُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 13 – The one who does not happen to have a proof for himself, so the (swearing of) the oath is turned upon him

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/284)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/284)

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hisham Bin Salim,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The swearing would be turned upon the claimant’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hisham ibn Salim who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that the oath can be turned to the plaintiff.”
